summary: The task is complete in substance. Prisma/SQLite persistence is wired with migrations, repo-local database configuration, an idempotent seed path, generated client setup, and repeatability coverage. The schema covers endpoint/tool names, title/description, enabled state, immutable IDs, ordered parameters, response cases, default response handling, delete code, timestamps, and basic failure config fields. The generated DB schema documentation matches the implemented Prisma shape. The required deterministic gates are reported passing, including repeatable db:prepare and full verify.
satisfied_exit_criteria: npm run db:prepare creates or updates SQLite runtime state via Prisma migrations, client generation, and endpoint seed defaults.
db:prepare is idempotent: the unit test runs it twice against an isolated SQLite database and asserts one endpoint, one parameter, and two response cases.
Schema represents endpoint names, descriptions, enabled state, ordered parameters, response cases, default responses, delete codes, timestamps, and failure config fields.
docs/generated/db-schema.md matches the implemented Endpoint, EndpointParam, ResponseCase models and seed assumptions.
Required checks passed per deterministic check summary: npm run db:prepare, npm run test:unit, npm run verify.
